long_name: Sea-Ice Mass Change Through Basal Growth
description: Rate of change of sea-ice mass due to vertical growth of existing sea ice at its base divided by grid-cell area. Note that this number is always positive or zero since sea-ice melt is collected in sidmassmeltbot. This is to account for differential growth and melt in models with a sub-grid scale ice thickness distribution.
cell_methods: area: time: mean where sea_ice over all_area_types
